Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}I couldn't sleep last night because I kept thinking about school starting, so I came to the nurse's office to nap...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}But that nurse gave me some weird medicine instead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 320}I turned it down 'cause it looked really gross... Only a brave soul would dare drink something like that![n]{f 1 1}
